feat.name: Voluminous Vials
feat.special: At 12th level or higher, you can select this feat a second time to increase your number of versatile vials per day to 6. At 18th level or higher, you can select this feat a third time to increase your number of versatile vials per day to 7.
feat.text: Your number of versatile vials per day increases to 5.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
